observations.archetype_gloss: The central integrating figure undergoing transformation and renewal
observations.summary: Dan experiences a profound moment of cleansing and renewal, symbolized by a wind that blows away all burdens, leaving him hollow and open to a new vision represented by a single, impossibly bright star. This marks a pivotal emergence of his Self archetype as he sheds old constraints and looks toward a higher truth.

evidence.quote: "And then... a wind came. It blew everything away. All of it. The stones, the dust, everything. And I looked up, and there was a star. Just one. Impossibly bright."
